FlashCard.title: Flash Card
FlashCard.description: A single flash card with question and answer.

FlashCardSet.title: Flash Card Set
FlashCardSet.description: A collection of flash cards for a specific subject or class.

FlashCardAnalytics.title: Flash Card Analytics
FlashCardAnalytics.description: Tracking student performance on a flash card set.

AttendanceRecord.title: Attendance Record
AttendanceRecord.description: Daily attendance record for a student or staff member.

LibraryItem.title: Library Item
LibraryItem.description: A book or resource in the school library.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: A class assignment or homework task.

Quotation.title: Quotation Record
Quotation.description: A record of a financial quotation issued to a client.

entity.description: The name of the student or entity.

amount.description: The total amount of the quotation.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the quotation.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the quotation was created.

Submission.title: Assignment Submission
Submission.description: A record of a student's submission for an assignment.

StudentRevenue.title: Student Revenue Record
StudentRevenue.description: A record of revenue received from a student.

grade.description: The grade or class of the student.

category.description: The type of fee (e.g., Tuition, Library).

uid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

EntityRevenue.title: Entity Revenue Record
EntityRevenue.description: A record of revenue received from an external entity.

entity.description: The name of the external entity.

type.description: The type of funding (e.g., Grant, Sponsorship).

uid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

Expense.title: Expense Record
Expense.description: A record of an operational expense.

entity.description: The name of the vendor or entity.

category.description: The category of the expense (e.g., Utilities, Maintenance).

uid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

AssetRecord.title: Asset Record
AssetRecord.description: A record of an asset purchase or valuation.

entity.description: The name of the vendor or entity.

category.description: The category of the asset (e.g., Computers, Furniture).

amount.description: The value or cost of the asset.

uid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

Payroll.title: Payroll Record
Payroll.description: A record of a staff salary payment.

staff.description: The name of the staff member.

role.description: The role of the staff member.

uid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the transaction.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

FinancialCategory.title: Financial Category
FinancialCategory.description: A financial category for revenue, expenses, or assets.

budget.description: The target budget or revenue goal for this category.

subcategories.description: The number of sub-categories or items.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the category.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the category was created.

InventoryItem.title: Inventory Item
InventoryItem.description: An item in the school inventory (asset).

minLevel.description: The minimum stock level for alert.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the item.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the item was created.
The timestamp when the user was created.

Invoice.title: Invoice Record
Invoice.description: A record of an invoice issued to a student or entity.

entity.description: The name of the student or entity.

category.description: The category of the invoice (e.g., Tuition Fees).

amount.description: The total amount of the invoice.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the invoice.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the invoice was created.

Receipt.title: Receipt Record
Receipt.description: A record of a payment receipt.

invoiceId.description: The ID of the linked invoice.

entity.description: The name of the student or entity.

uid.description: The UID of the user who recorded the receipt.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the receipt was created.

PenaltyRule.title: Penalty Rule
PenaltyRule.description: A rule for applying penalties to late payments.

value.description: The value of the penalty (amount or percentage).

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the rule.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the rule was created.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the task.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the task was created.

ReminderRule.title: Automated Reminder Rule
ReminderRule.description: A rule for automated financial reminders.

name.description: The name of the reminder rule.

trigger.description: The trigger condition (e.g., 3 Days Before Due).

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the rule.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the rule was created.

CommunicationTemplate.title: Communication Template
CommunicationTemplate.description: An email or SMS template for financial communications.

lastModified.description: The timestamp of the last modification.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created/modified the template.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the template was created.

Student.title: Student Profile
Student.description: A record of a student in the school.

name.description: The full name of the student.

classId.description: The ID of the class the student belongs to.

email.description: The contact email for the student/parent.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the record.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

Class.title: Academic Class
Class.description: A grade level or primary academic unit (e.g., Grade 10).

name.description: The name of the class (e.g., Grade 10).

sections.description: List of section IDs or names.

Section.title: Class Section
Section.description: A specific section of a class (e.g., 10-A).

Enrollment.title: Student Enrollment
Enrollment.description: A record linking a student to a class and section for an academic year.

AcademicYear.title: Academic Year
AcademicYear.description: A record of an academic year (e.g., 2025-2026).

TimetableSlot.title: Timetable Slot
TimetableSlot.description: A single slot in a class timetable.

LiveClass.title: Live Class Record
LiveClass.description: A record of a live virtual class session.

Staff.title: Staff Profile
Staff.description: A record of a staff member in the school.

name.description: The full name of the staff member.

role.description: The role of the staff member (e.g., Teacher, Principal).

department.description: The department the staff member belongs to.

email.description: The contact email for the staff member.

joinDate.description: The date the staff member joined.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the record.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.

Lead.title: Admissions Lead
Lead.description: A lead in the admissions pipeline.

LeadDocument.title: Lead Document
LeadDocument.description: A document associated with a lead.

LeadCommunication.title: Lead Communication
LeadCommunication.description: A communication record for a lead.

AdmissionsAutomationRule.title: Admissions Automation Rule
AdmissionsAutomationRule.description: An automation rule for the admissions pipeline.

FinancialSettings.title: Financial Settings
FinancialSettings.description: Global financial settings for the school.

retainedEarnings.description: The retained earnings from previous periods.

currency.description: The currency symbol or code used in the application.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

TransportVehicle.title: Transport Vehicle
TransportVehicle.description: A vehicle used for school transport.

Graduate.title: Graduate Record
Graduate.description: A record of a student who has graduated.

Alumnus.title: Alumnus Record
Alumnus.description: A record of an alumnus in the network.

BehaviorIncident.title: Behavior Incident
BehaviorIncident.description: A record of a student behavior incident (merit or demerit).

Achievement.title: Achievement Certificate
Achievement.description: A record of a student achievement or certificate issued.

LeaveRequest.title: Leave Request
LeaveRequest.description: A record of a staff leave request.

FeeStructure.title: Fee Structure
FeeStructure.description: A record of a school fee structure for a specific class and academic year.

JobOpening.title: Job Opening
JobOpening.description: A record of a job opening in the school.

JobApplication.title: Job Application
JobApplication.description: A record of a job application for a specific opening.

FeeDiscount.title: Fee Discount
FeeDiscount.description: A record of a fee discount rule.

BankTransaction.title: Bank Transaction
BankTransaction.description: A record of a bank transaction.

HostelRoom.title: Hostel Room
HostelRoom.description: A record of a hostel room.

HostelAllocation.title: Hostel Allocation
HostelAllocation.description: A record of a student room allocation.

MessMenu.title: Mess Menu
MessMenu.description: A record of a daily mess menu.

PurchaseOrder.title: Purchase Order
PurchaseOrder.description: A record of an inventory purchase.

/financial_settings/{userId}.description: Collection of financial settings per user.

/flashcard_analytics/{analyticsId}.description: Collection of flash card analytics records.
